framework.name: Agent-Specific Tokenization
framework.description: Issuing unique payment tokens for each agent-merchant pair to isolate risk, prevent replay attacks, and avoid exposing raw card numbers. Tokens are scoped to prevent agents from deviating from pre-defined permissions. Appears to be an extension of existing network tokenization but adapted for non-human actors.
framework.raw_quote: By issuing tokens unique to each agent and merchant, Visa isolates risk and prevents replay attacks or credential reuse. Consumers never expose raw card numbers, and agents cannot deviate from pre-defined scopes.

source.title: How Visa Enables AI Agents to Shop and Pay - Soniclinker - Create Agent Optimized Websites
